title: Tiny Space Travelers: Squid in Orbit
story: Blast off! On June 3, 2021, NASA sent some unusual passengers to the International Space Station. Aboard SpaceX's Falcon 9 rocket were 128 baby squid and thousands of tiny animals too small to see. These miniature astronauts weren't going on vacation. Scientists wanted to study how space travel affects small creatures. The squid and microscopic animals would help researchers learn about the challenges of long space journeys.
activity_question: What kind of rocket carried the tiny creatures to space?

title: A Hungry Caterpillar Crawls into Hearts
story: A tiny caterpillar with a big appetite munched its way into children's hearts in 1969. On June 3 that year, Eric Carle's colorful picture book 'The Very Hungry Caterpillar' was published. With its vibrant illustrations and clever die-cut pages, the book quickly became a beloved classic, inspiring young readers to explore the wonders of nature and the magic of transformation.

title: Floating in the Cosmic Sea
story: Astronaut Ed White took a breathtaking leap into the void. In 1965, he became the first American to perform a spacewalk during the Gemini 4 mission. On June 3, White floated freely outside his spacecraft, tethered only by a thin cord. For nearly half an hour, he glided through the inky blackness, marveling at Earth's beauty below. This historic moment paved the way for future space exploration and captivated millions watching from home.

title: Daring Climb to the Top

title: The Kinks' Lyrical Transatlantic Twist
story: Rock history took a fizzy turn in 1970. Ray Davies of The Kinks flew from New York to London and back on June 3. His mission? To change just one word in their hit song 'Lola'. title: Pioneering Insurance Company Makes History
story: A groundbreaking moment in business history unfolded on June 3, 1919. African American entrepreneurs in Chicago launched the Supreme Liberty Life Insurance Company. It opened doors for financial services in communities often overlooked by mainstream businesses.

title: The Great Trek: Workers Ride the Rails
story: Freight cars rumbled to life as a thousand jobless Canadians climbed aboard in Vancouver. It was June 3, 1935, and these brave souls were starting an epic journey. Their destination?
